completion_promises.evidence: Fixed 9 ruff errors across 4 test files: removed unused imports (subprocess, sys in test_dependency.py; asyncio, MagicMock in test_transcript_tools.py), fixed import sorting (I001 in test_transcript_client.py and unit/test_transcript.py), and reformatted 2 lines exceeding 100 chars (E501 in test_transcript_client.py).
